'''dhohakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrillar|fibrillar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrillar|fibrillar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhohakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhohakithi|dhohakithi]] || [[word:dhohakiji|dhohakiji]] || [[word:dhohakishi|dhohakishi]] || [[word:dhohakiki|dhohakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhohakuthuthu|dhohakuthuthu]] || [[word:dhohakujuju|dhohakujuju]] || [[word:dhohakushushu|dhohakushushu]] || [[word:dhohakukuku|dhohakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhohakuthu|dhohakuthu]] || [[word:dhohakuju|dhohakuju]] || [[word:dhohakushu|dhohakushu]] || [[word:dhohakuku|dhohakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhohakufthuf|dhohakufthuf]] || [[word:dhohakufjuf|dhohakufjuf]] || [[word:dhohakufshuf|dhohakufshuf]] || [[word:dhohakufkuf|dhohakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhohakethe|dhohakethe]] || [[word:dhohakeje|dhohakeje]] || [[word:dhohakeshe|dhohakeshe]] || [[word:dhohakeke|dhohakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhohakothotho|dhohakothotho]] || [[word:dhohakojojo|dhohakojojo]] || [[word:dhohakoshosho|dhohakoshosho]] || [[word:dhohakokoko|dhohakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhohakotho|dhohakotho]] || [[word:dhohakojo|dhohakojo]] || [[word:dhohakosho|dhohakosho]] || [[word:dhohakoko|dhohakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhohakofthof|dhohakofthof]] || [[word:dhohakofjof|dhohakofjof]] || [[word:dhohakofshof|dhohakofshof]] || [[word:dhohakofkof|dhohakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfthĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfjĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfshĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfkĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfthĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfjĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfshĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfkĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfthĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfjĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfshĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhohakĂŻfkĂŻf|dhohakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhohakĂŠthĂŠ|dhohakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhohakĂŠjĂŠ|dhohakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhohakĂŠshĂŠ|dhohakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhohakĂŠkĂŠ|dhohakĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhohakathatha|dhohakathatha]] || [[word:dhohakajaja|dhohakajaja]] || [[word:dhohakashasha|dhohakashasha]] || [[word:dhohakakaka|dhohakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhohakatha|dhohakatha]] || [[word:dhohakaja|dhohakaja]] || [[word:dhohakasha|dhohakasha]] || [[word:dhohakaka|dhohakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhohakafthaf|dhohakafthaf]] || [[word:dhohakafjaf|dhohakafjaf]] || [[word:dhohakafshaf|dhohakafshaf]] || [[word:dhohakafkaf|dhohakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhohakasha|dhohakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhohakshĂ«sha|dhohakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhohakrosha|dhohakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhohakmusha|dhohakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhohakyasha|dhohakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhohaknkshĂ«sha|godhohaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhohaknkrosha|godhohaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhohaknkmusha|godhohaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhohaknkyasha|godhohaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhohahakasha|dhohahakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhohahakshĂ«sha|dhohahakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhohahakrosha|dhohahakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhohahakmusha|dhohahakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhohahakyasha|dhohahakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhohahaknkshĂ«sha|godhohahaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhohahaknkrosha|godhohahaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhohahaknkmusha|godhohahaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhohahaknkyasha|godhohahaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhehĂŠkasha|dhehĂŠkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhehĂŠkshĂ«sha|dhehĂŠkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhehĂŠkrosha|dhehĂŠkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhehĂŠkmusha|dhehĂŠkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhehĂŠkyasha|dhehĂŠkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhehĂŠknkshĂ«sha|godhehĂŠknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhehĂŠknkrosha|godhehĂŠknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhehĂŠknkmusha|godhehĂŠknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhehĂŠknkyasha|godhehĂŠknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhohfakasha|dhohfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhohfakshĂ«sha|dhohfakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhohfakrosha|dhohfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhohfakmusha|dhohfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhohfakyasha|dhohfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhohfaknkshĂ«sha|godhohfaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhohfaknkrosha|godhohfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhohfaknkmusha|godhohfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhohfaknkyasha|godhohfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
